name: Fine-grained Computation-Communication Overlap via Tile-level Signaling and Scheduling for Mixture-of-Experts

description: arXiv:2607.19539v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures increase model capacity without proportionally increasing computation cost and have become a key building block for scaling large language models (LLMs) to trillion-parameter regimes. Efficient deployment of these MoE models relies on distributed execution across multiple GPUs, where each MoE layer involves...
author: Minyu Cui, Anna Wingkvist, Morgan Ericsson
